page: Microsoft Azure D2ads_v7 is a general-purpose virtual machine belonging to the Dadsv7 server family. It is powered by an AMD processor utilizing the x86_64 CPU architecture. The instance features 2 dedicated vCPUs and 8.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This server type includes 118 GB of local storage and is capable of utilizing Premium Storage. Virtualization is managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The configuration does not include any graphics processing units or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the D2ads_v7 offers a balanced entry-level hardware profile with dedicated CPU allocation and local disk space. This resource balance makes it suitable for general-purpose workloads, small-scale databases, web serving, and development environments that require dedicated compute resources without massive memory or GPU acceleration.
description: The Microsoft Azure D2ads_v7 is an x86_64 general-purpose virtual machine from the Dadsv7 server family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features an AMD processor with 2 dedicated vCPUs and 8.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. For storage, the instance is equipped with 118 GB of local disk space and supports Premium Storage configurations. It does not include integrated GPU hardware or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This server type is designed for entry-level general-purpose workloads, including web serving, small databases, and development environments, offering a qualitative balance of dedicated compute resources and local storage capacity.
